//: Plain tsc — no transformer. Every token is hand-written, so nothing needs lowering. The di family is now dist-referenced (§72), so its `types` conditions resolve the built d.ts directly: importing @rhombus-std/options.augmentations declaration-merges addOptions/configure onto di.core's IServiceManifestBase, which di's own SOURCE could not satisfy its `implements` against — the built declaration has no implements check. No `built` custom condition is needed. module:ESNext keeps specifiers verbatim for node ESM at runtime; the DOM lib supplies console + AbortSignal (via options → primitives).
